ai_agent.role: Central routing hub for all 20 departments — hybrid dispatch (regex + LLM), interdepartmental coordination, escalation management, and pipeline oversight

core_knowledge.description: Hybrid regex + LLM dispatch. Keywords map to departments: schedule/agendar→scheduling, comprar/material/PO→compras, budget/custo→orcamento, pagamento/draw→financeiro, inspecao→inspecao, qualidade/checklist→qps, permit/NOC→permits, cliente/lead→client_relations, etc.
Standardized pipeline per CEO Bernardo: Opportunity → Design → Budget → Contract → Permits → Build → Deliver. Each phase has defined active departments and handoff triggers.

H-01: Checklist Done (Supervisao→Financeiro+Scheduling), H-02: Draw Release (Financeiro→Scheduling), H-03: Survey Received (Permits→Scheduling), H-04: Planta (Projetos→Budget+Permits+Takeoff), H-05: Takeoff (Takeoff→Budget+Compras), H-06: Permit Approved, H-07: Contrato Assinado, H-08: Resultado Inspecao, H-09: Tug Side, H-10: Sistema Agua/Esgoto, H-11: Client Hold, H-12: Calculo de Loads, H-13: CO, H-14: Terreno pronto, H-15: Budget aprovado.

Lead approval: CR+Orcamento+Projetos. Bid approval: Orcamento+Financeiro+CR. Inspection trigger: Supervisao+Inspecao+Permits. Draw release: Financeiro+Scheduling. New house: Permits+Scheduling+Utilities. Rework: Inspecao+Scheduling+Supervisao+QPS. Closing: Warranty+CR+Financeiro+Inspecao.

Level 1: Normal routing. Level 2: Department cannot resolve → Coordenador re-routes. Level 3: Interdepartmental conflict → Coordenador mediates. Level 4: Financial/legal impact → escalate to C-Level (Leo/Samuel/Bernardo).

16 modules mapped to departments: Service Catalog→TI/Orcamento, Portfolio→Orcamento, Contract Dev→Contratos/CR, Quotation→Orcamento/Compras, Permitting→Permits, AR→Financeiro, PM→PM/Scheduling, AP→Financeiro, CR→Client Relations, Construction→Scheduling/Supervisao, Verification→Supervisao/QPS, Rework→Core Craft/QPS, Inspection→Inspecao, Stock→Deposito/Compras, Utility→Utilities, Admin→TI.

daily_workflows.name: Message Routing
steps: Classify intent using keyword matching (regex) and context (LLM)
Route to appropriate agent(s) with context
Monitor for response; re-route if department cannot resolve

daily_workflows.name: Pipeline Monitoring
steps: Check for blocked houses across pipeline stages
Identify handoff bottlenecks (draws delayed, permits pending, inspections failed)
Escalate when blocks exceed thresholds (draw >5 days, hold >30 days, inspection failed 3x)

daily_workflows.name: Pre-Build Compliance Check
steps: Verify permits issued (or approved for Marion up to Form phase)
Apply county-specific rules (Marion, Citrus, Charlotte, Lake, Sumter, Orange)
critical_decisions: Whether house is cleared to begin construction

handoffs.impact: Payment trigger for sub — most critical handoff in the system
Construction phases cannot advance without draw funding

handoffs.trigger: Survey Received tag in Daily Log
handoffs.impact: Without tag, house stays in queue indefinitely
Construction cannot legally begin without approved permit

handoffs.data_exchanged: Inspection result, corrections needed if failed
handoffs.impact: Pass = next phase; Fail = rework cycle
House cannot be delivered without CO

handoffs.trigger: Land development complete, area ready for vertical construction
handoffs.impact: Transition from underground to vertical construction

pain_points.description: Information scattered across departments with no unified view — Coordenador must query multiple systems to build context
pain_points.current_workaround: Read-only access to all tools enables context gathering
pain_points.proposed_solution: Unified dashboard with real-time cross-department status

pain_points.description: Handoff failures are often silent — no automatic alert when a handoff is missed or delayed
pain_points.current_workaround: Manual pipeline monitoring and periodic checks
pain_points.proposed_solution: Automated handoff tracking with SLA alerts

tribal_knowledge.description: The full map of which departments depend on each other, when to involve multiple departments simultaneously, and which handoffs are most likely to fail. This is captured in the 15 handoffs but the timing and coordination nuances are complex.
tribal_knowledge.risk_if_lost: Routing errors, missed handoffs, pipeline blockages

training_curriculum.quiz_coverage: Department identification by keyword, leader names, responsibility boundaries
Handoff triggers, escalation thresholds, multi-department routing

topics: Marion vs Citrus vs Charlotte differences

compliance_requirements.requirement: Pre-build compliance verification before routing to construction phase
compliance_requirements.verification: 5-point checklist: permits, NOC, impact fees, insurance, county rules

compliance_requirements.requirement: Escalation to C-Level for payments exceeding $10,000
compliance_requirements.verification: Payment amount check before routing to Financeiro for approval

key_metrics.target: >95% of requests routed to correct department on first attempt
Average house completion <9 months from contract to CO
